# unifi_wan (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi WAN interface by `id` or `name` within a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a WAN interface by name.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_wan" "internet_1" {
  site_id = data.unifi_site.main.id
  name    = "Internet 1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
